description: This is a JUnit test class for SupportingDocumentService in a Spring Boot project. It contains unit tests that verify the behavior of document upload, download, and delete operations, including validation for file size, type, metadata, and ownership enforcement.

classes.name: test_supporting_document_service_test
classes.description: Contains unit tests for SupportingDocumentService, verifying behaviors like file validation, metadata normalization, security checks, and interaction with storage and repository layers.

methods.name: upload_emptyFile_rejected
methods.description: Tests that uploading an empty file results in an IllegalArgumentException.

methods.name: upload_tooLarge_rejected
methods.description: Tests that files exceeding max size are rejected with an exception.

methods.name: upload_unsupportedContentType_rejected
methods.description: Verifies that unsupported MIME types are rejected with proper message.

methods.name: upload_happyPath_persistsMetadataAndChecksum
methods.description: Checks successful upload, metadata normalization, checksum calculation, and correct repository saving.

methods.name: upload_metadataMustBeObject
methods.description: Ensures that non-object JSON metadata strings are rejected.

methods.name: download_notOwnedOrMissing_rejected
methods.description: Ensures that attempting to download a document not owned by user or missing results in an error.

methods.name: delete_owned_callsStorageDelete
methods.description: Verifies that deleting an owned document calls the storage layer's delete method and removes the record.
